case_title: FRANCIS JERVIS VS. NIMER HALTEH ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY JERVIS, FRANCIS AS TO DEFENDANT HALTEH, NIMER HALTEH, SYLVIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S NIMER HALTEH AND SYLVIA HALTEH ARE PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
